Agricultural Insurance Company of India, ICICI Lombard General Insurance Co., Ltd., Bajaj Allianz
General Insurance Company, HDFC Ego General Insurance Company and United India Insurance Company
These are the 5 insurance companies. Implemented by Government Decision of 01.07.2022. The Indian Agriculture
The insurance company is the coordinating company of insurance companies in the state. Agricultural Insurance Company of India Reference No.
Under Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY) in Kharif season 2022 and Rabi season 2022-23.
Under the 80:110 model, the state government is liable for compensation amounts in excess of 110%.
A demand has been made to provide funds to the tune of Rs. 18,58,80, 947 / -. Accordingly
The Director (Agro Processing & Planning), Agriculture Commissionerate, Pune has issued a notification vide Reference No. (10) made under the
As per the request, Kharif season 2022 and Rabi season under Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana 2022-23
For the amount of indemnity liability greater than 110% according to the 80:110 model in
Commissionerate for implementation of Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana with a corpus of Rs. 18,58,80, 947 / -
Payments to the Agricultural Insurance Company of India from the balance in the ESCROW bank account opened at the level
The matter of distribution was under the consideration of the government.
The Government's Decisions:
Consider the demand submitted by the Agricultural Insurance Company of India and the recommendation of the Agriculture Commissionerate.
Take 80:110 under Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana in Kharif 2022 and Rabi 2022 2022-23
As per the model, the liability for damages in excess of 110% is Rs. 18,58,80, 947 / -
This amount was provided to the Agricultural Insurance Company of India for the implementation of the Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana.
The balance in the ESCROW bank account opened at the Commissionerate level is as follows:
The distribution is being approved by the government.
Kharif 2022 and Rabi 2022-23
The amount is being disbursed for Kharif 2022 and Rabi season 2022-23.
The use will not be permissible for other previous seasons.
3. Funds to be disbursed under this Government Decision under Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana.
Responsibility to spend as per the guidelines and Government decisions issued from time to time.
The Commissioner (Agriculture) will be there.
